metaDesc: Custom web design and SEO for Charlotte and Mecklenburg County businesses: restaurants, shops, trades, professional practices. Websites you own, no templates.
ogDesc: Custom web design and development for Charlotte and Mecklenburg County. Websites, SEO, and branding you own outright. No templates.
twDesc: Custom web design and development in Charlotte, NC. Websites, SEO, and branding for restaurants, shops, trades, and small businesses across Mecklenburg County.
schemaDesc: Web design and development in Charlotte, NC. Custom websites, SEO, and branding for independent restaurants, shops, trades, professional services, and small businesses in Mecklenburg County, Belmont, Mount Holly, and Gastonia.
heroSub: Custom websites, SEO, and branding for the independent restaurants, shops, trades, and professional practices of Charlotte and Mecklenburg County. No templates, no lock-in, and you own every line of it.
localH2: Built for Charlotte, the county it anchors.
localP1: Charlotte is the county seat of Mecklenburg County and the largest city in North Carolina. This is where the first gold rush in America began in 1803, and where the Charlotte US Mint opened in 1837 to process the region's gold. That same spirit of commerce and confidence still runs through Uptown, NoDa, South End, and Plaza Midwood, where the businesses that keep this city going are built on service, craft, and direct relationships with their customers.
localP2: We build for the independent restaurant owner in NoDa, the boutique shop on Central Avenue, the contractor and trades business covering neighborhoods across the county, the professional practice on Tryon Street. Every site is designed and coded around your business, not stamped out of a template.
mapMetaLine: Serving Charlotte, Belmont, Mount Holly, Gastonia, Cramerton & the Charlotte metro
citiesIntro: Rooted in Charlotte, working across the region. Explore a nearby town:
hereCard: Independent restaurants, shops, and professional practices in the heart of the queen city. Sites that bring customers and clients through the door.

neighborCards.name: Belmont
neighborCards.desc: A Gaston County town just west of Charlotte where local businesses need a modern digital presence.

neighborCards.name: Mount Holly
neighborCards.desc: A growing Gaston County community with retail, restaurants, and local services that need clean, mobile-first design.

neighborCards.name: Gastonia
neighborCards.desc: The largest city in Gaston County, home to manufacturers, Main Street businesses, and independent operators.

faqOutsideAnswer: Yes. We serve Mecklenburg County, Belmont, Mount Holly, Gastonia, Cramerton, and throughout North Carolina, all done remotely with recorded walkthroughs.
faqBusinessesAnswer: Independent restaurants and food businesses, retail shops and boutiques, trades and contractors, professional practices, and small manufacturers across Charlotte and Mecklenburg County.
